name: Australian United Investment Company Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$10.9575. Risk/reward is 0.26:1.
